sections.title: 1. Data Controller
sections.content:
Marinali Rooms
Address: Via O. Marinali, 13 - 36061 Bassano del Grappa (Italy)
Email: welcome@marinalirooms.com

sections.title: 2. Types of Data Collected
sections.content:
• Data provided voluntarily: name, surname, email, phone number, credit card details (via Krossbooking), special requests.
  • Browsing data: anonymized IP, browser type, pages visited.
  • Cookies: only technical cookies for Krossbooking – see Cookie Policy.

sections.title: 3. Purposes and Legal Basis
sections.content:
Contract execution (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR):

  • Booking and stay management
  • Booking-related communications

Legal obligations (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR):

  • Guest data communication to Police Headquarters (art. 109 R.D. 773/1931)
  • Tax and accounting obligations (10 years retention)

Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR):

  • Newsletters and marketing communications
  • Saving preferences for future bookings

sections.title: 4. Data Recipients
sections.content: Krossbooking, Police Headquarters, Municipality, ISTAT, Region, tax/legal consultants, judicial authorities.

sections.title: 5. Retention Periods
sections.content:
• Tax data: 10 years
  • Police reporting receipts: 5 years
  • Marketing: until consent withdrawal (max 24 months)

sections.title: 6. Data Subject Rights (Arts. 15-22 GDPR)
sections.content: Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability, objection, withdraw consent, lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority (https://www.garanteprivacy.it).

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: Email: welcome@marinalirooms.com

sections.title: 1. Titolare del trattamento
sections.content:
Marinali Rooms
Indirizzo: Via O. Marinali, 13 - 36061 Bassano del Grappa (Italy)
Email: welcome@marinalirooms.com

sections.title: 2. Tipologie di dati raccolti
sections.content:
• Dati forniti volontariamente: nome, cognome, email, telefono, dati carta di credito (tramite Krossbooking), richieste speciali.
  • Dati di navigazione: IP anonimizzato, browser, pagine visitate.
  • Cookie: solo cookie tecnici Krossbooking – vedi Cookie Policy.

sections.title: 3. Finalità e base giuridica
sections.content:
Esecuzione del contratto (Art. 6 par. 1 lett. b GDPR):

  • Gestione prenotazioni e soggiorni
  • Comunicazioni relative alla prenotazione

Obblighi legali (Art. 6 par. 1 lett. c GDPR):

  • Comunicazione dati alla Questura (art. 109 R.D. 773/1931)
  • Adempimenti fiscali e contabili (10 anni)

Consenso (Art. 6 par. 1 lett. a GDPR):

  • Newsletter e comunicazioni commerciali
  • Salvataggio preferenze per future prenotazioni

sections.title: 4. Destinatari dei dati
sections.content: Krossbooking, Questura, Comune, ISTAT, Regione, consulenti commercialisti/fiscali, autorità giudiziarie.

sections.title: 5. Periodo di conservazione
sections.content:
• Dati fiscali: 10 anni
  • Ricevute Alloggiati Web: 5 anni
  • Marketing: fino a revoca consenso (max 24 months)

sections.title: 6. Diritti dell'interessato (Artt. 15-22 GDPR)
sections.content: Accesso, rettifica, cancellazione, limitazione, portabilità, opposizione, revoca consenso, reclamo al Garante Privacy (https://www.garanteprivacy.it).

sections.title: 7. Contatti
sections.content: Email: welcome@marinalirooms.com

sections.title: 1. Verantwortlicher
sections.content:
Marinali Rooms
Adresse: Via O. Marinali, 13 - 36061 Bassano del Grappa (Italy)
E-Mail: welcome@marinalirooms.com

sections.title: 2. Arten der erhobenen Daten
sections.content:
• Freiwillig bereitgestellte Daten: Name, Vorname, E-Mail, Telefonnummer, Kreditkartendaten (über Krossbooking), Sonderwünsche.
  • Navigationsdaten: anonymisierte IP, Browsertyp, besuchte Seiten.
  • Cookies: nur technische Cookies für Krossbooking – siehe Cookie-Richtlinie.

sections.title: 3. Zwecke und Rechtsgrundlagen
sections.content:
Vertragserfüllung (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO):

  • Buchungs- und Aufenthaltsverwaltung
  • Buchungsbezogene Kommunikation

Rechtliche Verpflichtungen (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. c DSGVO):

  • Meldung der Gästedaten an die Polizeibehörden (Art. 109 R.D. 773/1931)
  • Steuerliche und buchhalterische Pflichten (10 Jahre Aufbewahrung)

Einwilligung (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. a DSGVO):

  • Newsletter und Werbekommunikation
  • Speicherung von Präferenzen für zukünftige Buchungen

sections.title: 4. Datenempfänger
sections.content: Krossbooking, Polizeibehörden, Gemeinde, ISTAT, Region, Steuer-/Rechtsberater, Justizbehörden.

sections.title: 5. Aufbewahrungsfristen
sections.content:
• Steuerdaten: 10 Jahre
  • Meldebelege Polizei: 5 Jahre
  • Marketing: bis zum Widerruf der Einwilligung (max. 24 Monate)

sections.title: 6. Rechte der betroffenen Person (Art. 15-22 DSGVO)
sections.content: Auskunft, Berichtigung, Löschung, Einschränkung der Verarbeitung, Datenübertragbarkeit, Widerspruch, Widerruf der Einwilligung, Beschwerde bei der Aufsichtsbehörde (https://www.garanteprivacy.it).

sections.title: 7. Kontakt
sections.content: E-Mail: welcome@marinalirooms.com

en.title: Cookie Policy
en.intro: This website uses only technical cookies strictly necessary for the Krossbooking booking widget to function properly.

sections.title: Which cookies do we use?
sections.content:
• Session cookies: keep your booking active while you navigate the site.
  • Preference cookies: remember your selected language and currency during the booking process.

No profiling, marketing or tracking cookies are used by our site or the Krossbooking widget.

sections.title: How to manage or disable cookies
sections.content:
You can control, limit or delete cookies through your browser settings (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, etc.).

Please note: disabling technical cookies may break the room booking form.

sections.title: Third-party data processing
sections.content: Bookings are handled by Krossbooking. For information on how your personal data is processed, please read Krossbooking's official privacy policy: https://www.krossbooking.com/privacy

sections.title: Changes to this Cookie Policy
sections.content: Any updates will be posted on this page. We recommend checking it occasionally.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For questions about cookies or data processing: welcome@marinalirooms.com

it.title: Cookie Policy
it.intro: Questo sito web utilizza esclusivamente cookie tecnici necessari al funzionamento del widget di prenotazione Krossbooking.

sections.title: Quali cookie vengono utilizzati?
sections.content:
• Cookie di sessione: mantengono attiva la prenotazione mentre navighi tra le pagine.
  • Cookie di preferenza: ricordano la lingua e la valuta selezionate durante il processo di prenotazione.

Nessun cookie di profilazione, marketing o tracciamento viene utilizzato dal nostro sito o dal widget Krossbooking.

sections.title: Come gestire o disabilitare i cookie
sections.content:
Puoi controllare, limitare o cancellare i cookie direttamente dalle impostazioni del tuo browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, ecc.).

Attenzione: la disabilitazione dei cookie tecnici potrebbe impedire il corretto funzionamento del modulo di prenotazione delle camere.

sections.title: Dati e servizi di terze parti
sections.content: Le prenotazioni sono gestite tramite la piattaforma Krossbooking. Per informazioni sul trattamento dei tuoi dati personali, consulta la privacy policy ufficiale di Krossbooking: https://www.krossbooking.com/privacy

sections.title: Modifiche alla presente Cookie Policy
sections.content: Eventuali aggiornamenti verranno pubblicati su questa stessa pagina. Ti invitiamo a consultarla periodicamente.

sections.title: Contatti
sections.content: Per domande relative all'uso dei cookie o al trattamento dei tuoi dati: welcome@marinalirooms.com

de.title: Cookie-Richtlinie
de.intro: Diese Website verwendet ausschließlich technisch notwendige Cookies für das Krossbooking-Buchungs-Widget.

sections.title: Welche Cookies werden verwendet?
sections.content:
• Sitzungs-Cookies: halten die Buchung aktiv, während Sie auf der Website navigieren.
  • Präferenz-Cookies: speichern Ihre ausgewählte Sprache und Währung während des Buchungsvorgangs.

Es werden keine Profiling-, Marketing- oder Tracking-Cookies von unserer Website oder dem Krossbooking-Widget verwendet.

sections.title: Cookies verwalten oder deaktivieren
sections.content:
Sie können Cookies in den Einstellungen Ihres Browsers kontrollieren, einschränken oder löschen (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge usw.).

Wichtig: Wenn Sie technische Cookies deaktivieren, funktioniert das Buchungsformular möglicherweise nicht richtig.

sections.title: Datenverarbeitung durch Dritte
sections.content: Buchungen werden über Krossbooking abgewickelt. Informationen zur Verarbeitung Ihrer personenbezogenen Daten finden Sie in der offiziellen Datenschutzerklärung von Krossbooking: https://www.krossbooking.com/privacy

sections.title: Änderungen dieser Cookie-Richtlinie
sections.content: Alle Aktualisierungen werden auf dieser Seite veröffentlicht. Bitte schauen Sie gelegentlich vorbei.

sections.title: Kontakt
sections.content: Bei Fragen zu Cookies oder zur Datenverarbeitung: welcome@marinalirooms.com
